# Conversion Path Proof

## Goal

Prove that attention routes into a believable next step.

## Path

```text
ad promise
→ landing headline
→ proof asset
→ offer
→ CTA
→ activation
```

## Breaks

- ad and page mismatch,
- proof missing,
- CTA too large a commitment,
- price hidden,
- value vague,
- setup risk unclear.

## Rule

The landing page must continue the same hypothesis as the ad.
